title: 8 Ways a Man of God Leads Without a Title
caption:
You don't need a title to lead. You need a posture.

The man who waits until he's in charge before he starts leading will never be given the charge. Leadership in the kingdom looks like going first — first to apologize, first to serve, first to take the worst seat. It costs you something, and that cost is the whole point.

Eight moves any man can make today. Save this and do one this week.

#faith #leadership #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #discipleship
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
